title: Grilled Skewers with Savory Burrata Dip
description: A delicious and easy-to-make appetizer or snack featuring savory burrata cheese and grilled Peruvian-style skewers.
instructions: 1. Prepare the skewers by threading the bell peppers, onions, zucchini, tomato, and garlic onto each stick, leaving a little space between each piece.
2. Brush the skewers with a little bit of oil and season with salt and pepper.
3. Grill the skewers over medium-high heat for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the vegetables are tender and lightly charred.
4. Meanwhile, mix the savory spread with a little bit of water to create a dip.
5. Once the skewers are cooked, serve them with the burrata cheese and savory dip on the side.
